summary.purpose: Show why each reliability/latency layer is necessary rather than decorative.

rows.controlled_layer: refusal_expected answers are bypassed to a fixed refusal phrase
rows.expected_failure_mode: model answers when evidence contract requires refusal
rows.observed_without_layer: Round 01: 8 G002 refusal failures; 2 context-window runtime errors also show prompt-only routing fragility.
rows.observed_with_layer: V3.3 latency300: deterministic refusal rows complete with contract fail/warn = 0/0.

rows.controlled_layer: source_rights_question answers are assembled from evidence fields
rows.expected_failure_mode: rights/source labels missing, truncated, interpreted, or mismatched
rows.observed_without_layer: Round 01/02: 47 G005 unverified field assertions, 12 G006 missing source-rights tags, and 3 G007 tag mismatches.
rows.observed_with_layer: V3.3 latency300: source/rights rows are deterministic hybrid rows; contract fail/warn = 0/0.

rows.controlled_layer: EVIDENCE TAGS are injected by code instead of generated by the model
rows.expected_failure_mode: required fields are implicit, omitted, or copied imprecisely
rows.observed_without_layer: Round 02 200: 61 contract failures and 146 warnings; 146 G101 required-field visibility warnings.
rows.observed_with_layer: V3.3 latency300: contract fail/warn = 0/0 because required tags are exact evidence-derived strings.

rows.controlled_layer: polish_prose weakens absolute/first claims and inserts source-limited hedge
rows.expected_failure_mode: overconfidence and unsupported first/earliest language leak into delivered prose
rows.observed_with_layer: V3.3 latency300: 0 overconfidence, 0 unwarranted inference; guardrail compliance pass.

rows.controlled_layer: quality enforced by post-processing rather than long negative instructions
rows.expected_failure_mode: prompt-only guardrails preserve quality but inflate latency
rows.observed_without_layer: V3.2 guarded prose: Qwen avg total 8499 ms, P95 15307 ms, slow >10s 63.
rows.observed_with_layer: V3.3 postprocessed prose: Qwen avg total 2491 ms, P95 4190 ms, slow >10s 0; quality gates still pass.

rows.controlled_layer: model sees compact value summaries while tags preserve exact fields
rows.expected_failure_mode: larger prompts increase TTFT and long-tail latency
rows.observed_without_layer: Earlier less-pruned variants show higher generation cost; V3.1 safe body Qwen avg total 3100 ms and P95 7916 ms.
rows.observed_with_layer: V3.3 Qwen avg TTFT is reported separately in latency300 output and Qwen P95 total is 4190 ms.
